intro: Telecommunications, individual users, and internet infrastructure across Canada, Germany, and the United States were the primary targets in a recent wave of IoT-focused attacks. Over ten days in April 2026, ZCyberNews documented ten incidents linked to the Mirai threat actor. Key vulnerabilities exploited included CVE-2025-29635, CVE-2026-22898, CVE-2026-4682, CVE-2026-5057, and CVE-2024-3721, with the severity mix comprising two critical, five high, and three medium alerts. The logistics and residential sectors also faced significant exposure.
